title: GIPTIME Q-Hanger Hooks 50 Pack, Safety Buckle Design for Christmas Lights, Outdoor Garage New Year Party Wire Fairy LED Lights, White
features: High Quality Material: Made of sturdy metal material, the surface is coated with white coating, which is not easy to break, rust, durable, windproof or weatherproof.
Safety Buckle Design: The Q-hanger hook uses a safety buckle design to prevent items from shaking or falling due to wind, rain or other uncontrollable factors.

Easy to Install: You can directly hit the wood with a hammer or screw in the wood with a wrench. And the wing nut submersible can be used in connection with the drill bit, it will help you to install the screw hook more quickly and easily.

Wide Application: These hangers are suitable for hanging light weight items,such as outdoor festival light string, bird feeders, birdhouse, curtains,cords, chains, wind chimes, planters, chandelier and more.
What You Get: Pack of 50 * Q-hangers with 50 plastic tubes and 1 wing nut driver.
description: Product Description GIPTIME Professional Hanging Hooks Hardware Series Wing Nut Driver We give you a Wing Nut Driver.You can easily hook the wall with an electric drill and a wing nut driver. Wing Nut Driver is compatible with all types of electric drills and electric drilling tools. Specification: Product’s name: Q hanger hooks Size: 2.2*0.98inch Main Material: Made of high-quality carbon steel and plated with rust proof coating, the hooks are ready for years of heavy-duty daily use. Color: Black Suitable for: outdoor Lights, drip line, flower, birdhouses, curtains, ropes, chains, wind chimes and more Package List： Lights Hanger Hooks Expansion Tube Wing Nut Driver Why You Need It? 1. We give you a Wing Nut Driver. You can easily hook the wall with an electric drill and a wing nut driver. 2. Wing Nut Driver is compatible with all types of electric drills and electric drilling tools. 3. Are you still worried about the interior decoration? With our hooks, you can hang pictures, ceiling chandeliers, plant flowerpots, decorative furnishings, birdcages, clothes hangers, kitchen utensils, key pendants, etc. basically all indoor pendants can be satisfied. The living room, bathroom, kitchen and room can be used to make your room look clean and bright. 4. You don't have to worry that those walls can be used, it can be used for tiles, planks, lime walls, bricks, all you have to do is drill a hole with a drill, put it in a plastic tube, and screw the hooks in. They are all strong, and you don't have to worry about them falling off. Each hook is equipped with a separate plastic tube, which is enough for you to use. 5. When it comes to Christmas, these hooks will play the greatest role, whether it is hanging Christmas lights, or wire racks, or wall Christmas decoration, it can satisfy you, you can also hang parrot racks, hummingbird cages and other pet brackets.
